bench_setup.notes: FDCAN1 internal loopback (CCCR.TEST=1, TEST.LBCK=1). No external CAN transceiver or bus required — FDCAN_TX held recessive, FDCAN_RX disconnected from pin. Tests: FDCAN1 init (CCCR, NBTP, RXGFC), Message RAM (fixed G4 layout at 0x4000A400), standard ID filter (mask, accept all, FIFO0), Tx buffer 0 send (TXBAR.AR0), Rx FIFO0 receive and verify (ID=0x123, DLC=8, data=0x0102030405060708). Clock: PCLK1=16MHz HSI (RCC_CCIPR FDCANSEL=10b), 500 kbps. Error codes: 0xE001=INIT timeout, 0xE002=Rx timeout (includes IR snapshot), 0xE003=ID mismatch, 0xE004=DLC mismatch, 0xE005=data[0-3] mismatch, 0xE006=data[4-7] mismatch.
